SEARCH
Package edu.bu.pas.risk

Class Game

java.lang.Object
edu.bu.pas.risk.GameView
edu.bu.pas.risk.Game
public class Game extends GameView
The mutable game state for Risk.

Extends GameView with methods that modify the board, manage turns, and notify listeners of game events. You can get a mutable Game object from an immutable GameView object using: 


      Game game = new Game(gameView);
      GameView gameView = new GameView(game);

This class is the authoritative game state. Agents never receive a direct reference to this instance; instead, they receive an immutable snapshot.

  • Field Details

    • listeners

      protected final transient List<RiskListener> listeners
      The listeners that listen for different game events. These are not copied between game instances.

  • Constructor Details

    • Game

      public Game(Random random, Board board, List<IAgent> agents)

    • Game

      public Game(GameView game)
      Copy constructor.
      Parameters:
      game - Game state to copy from.

  • Method Details

    • registerListener

      public void registerListener(RiskListener listener)
      Registers a listener to receive game event callbacks.
      Parameters:
      listener - The listener to register.

    • setAgentInventory

      public void setAgentInventory(int agentId, List<TerritoryCard> inventory)
      Replaces the card inventory for the given agent.
      Parameters:
      agentId - The agent whose inventory to replace.
      inventory - The new list of territory cards.

    • incrementArmyBudget

      public void incrementArmyBudget(int agentIdx, int armies)
      Adds armies to the agent's budget. They will later redeem them via IAgent.placeOneArmy(GameView, boolean, int).
      Parameters:
      agentIdx - The agent to reward armies.
      armies - The number of armies to give.

    • setup

      public void setup()
      Setup phase, responsible for setting up initial territory owners.

    • doTurn

      public void doTurn()
      Executes a single turn for the current agent. This includes awarding bonus armies, placing armies, querying the agent for actions, and drawing a card if the agent claimed a territory.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if setup() has not been called.
